web_results.title: Bessent says Trump's pick for the next Fed chair could happen next week
web_results.description: After months of speculation and political intrigue, President Donald Trump is close to nominating the next chair of the Federal Reserve, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday.

web_results.title: Scott Bessent - Wikipedia
web_results.description: In April, he hosted a Palm Beach, Florida, fundraiser that raised $50 million for the campaign. In July, Bessent was a key economic adviser to Trump. On November 22, 2024, President-elect Donald Trump announced his intention to nominate Bessent to serve as the United States secretary of the ...

web_results.title: Trump may reach Fed chair decision as early as next week, Bessent says | Reuters
web_results.description: WASHINGTON, Jan 20 (Reuters) - U.S. President Donald Trump may decide on who the next chairman of the U.S. Federal Reserve will be as early as next week, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Tuesday.

The comments by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent underscore the urgency the Trump administration is feeling as it looks to replace the Federal Reserve chair.Credit...Eric Lee for The New York Times

web_results.title: Bessent: Fed pick this month, one candidate left to interview
web_results.description: President Trump will likely select a new Federal Reserve chair this month, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Thursday, as he gave new details on the search for America's next top central banker.

news_results.description: President Trump’s effort to get Kevin M. Warsh confirmed as the next Federal Reserve chair has been complicated by a criminal investigation into Jerome H. Powell.

news_results.title: Bessent refuses to say the administration will not sue the next Fed chair - Live Updates - POLITICO
news_results.description: "That is up to the president," the Treasury secretary said.

news_results.title: Scott Bessent expects Senate Republicans to proceed with Fed chief nomination hearing
news_results.description: Treasury Secretary reaches agreement to proceed with hearing for next Federal Reserve chair, despite senator's continued blockade.

news_results.title: Trump says he will announce his Federal Reserve chair nominee on Friday morning : NPR
news_results.description: President said he plans to announce new Federal Reserve chair choice Friday, after criticizing incumbent Jerome Powell for not cutting interest rates more aggressively.

news_results.title: Bessent says Trump's pick for the next Fed chair could happen next week
news_results.description: The president has whittled down the field to four candidates, Bessent told CNBC during an interview at the World Economic Forum in Switzerland.
